payload.title: Vice President, General Counsel & Secretary Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company

evidence_refs.source_quote: Susan Sarchi Vice President, General Counsel & Secretary Metro-North Commuter Railroad Company

payload.description: New LIRR terminal beneath Grand Central Terminal; first extension of LIRR service since 1910; opened for customers January 25, 2023 with shuttle service from Jamaica

evidence_refs.source_quote: GCM received customers for the very first time last Wednesday, January 25, when shuttle service from Jamaica kicked off with the 10:45 am Grand Central Direct Train from Jamaica. This represented the first extension of LIRR service since its first train to Penn Station in 1910.
For at least three weeks prior to the start of full service, LIRR will operate limited Grand Central Direct shuttle service between Jamaica and GCM.

payload.description: Capacity improvements at Jamaica station mentioned in President's Message in the Key Performance Metrics book

evidence_refs.source_quote: there are updates on Jamaica Capacity Improvements
